messages.content:
Hi,
I just attempted to submit my team's cheat sheet, but under my submission, it says "not submitted" and won't allow me to resubmit. I tried reloading and it says the same thing for my teammate. He can't resubmit on our behalf either. Do you know how to resolve this issue? Thank you!
Screenshot 2026-04-21 at 3.56.30 AM.png
Screenshot 2026-04-21 at 4.04.49 AM.png
messages.subject: Submission Error
